_description: Reference: a page with a custom-header component that auto-suppresses the native `{% section 'header' %}`. Added 2026-04-24 to close the Onyx/Unavis/DanMagi double-chrome reports.
_how_it_works: The custom header component must be created with category='header'. The renderer's context-builder inspects the page's blocks and the resolved components; if any block's component has category='header', it sets render_native_header=false so the default theme's {% section 'header' %} is skipped. Same rule for 'footer'. No settings toggle needed.
_manual_override: If you want to hide chrome without a matching component, set page.custom_fields = {hide_native_chrome: true} (both) or {hide_native_header: true}/{hide_native_footer: true} (granular).

_step_1_create_header_component.name: Acme Header
_step_1_create_header_component.html_template:
{{ props.brand | default: 'Acme' }}
{% for item in props.items %} {{ item.label }} {% endfor %}

_step_2_publish._note: Phase 11+12 gated — first call with dry_run=true returns a confirm_token, second call consumes it.

custom_fields._note: You only need these if you DON'T have a matching category='header'|'footer' component. Auto-detect handles the common case.
